name: IoT Device Cybersecurity Guidance for the Federal Government: IoT Device Cybersecurity Requirement Catalogs
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-213A (2021) — companion catalog to 800-213 with concrete device-level cybersecurity requirements.
relationToCloudSecurity: General cybersecurity guidance applicable to cloud-environment design and operations.
relationToAISecurity: Foundational cybersecurity guidance; applies to AI system implementations.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Structured the IoT Device Cybersecurity Capability Catalog into 800-213a-requirements.{csv,json}. 11 top-level capabilities, 54 sub-capabilities, 443 requirement rows. Each row carries capability_id (e.g., DI), capability_name, subcapability_id (e.g., IMS), subcapability_name, subcapability_description, subcapability_discussion, related_800_53_controls (e.g., 'IA-3, IA-4'), requirement_id (e.g., '1' or '1.a'), and requirement_text.

extraction_history.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.

notes: Metadata stub; acquire from NIST CSRC and extract.
